# Provenance: JUnit5 Assertions.java

Source file vendored for VocabDeriver source-learning (Phase 2).

- **URL**: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/junit-team/junit5/r5.10.2/junit-jupiter-api/src/main/java/org/junit/jupiter/api/Assertions.java
- **Tag**: r5.10.2
- **sha256**: 536e6f91e8b2d5123c5e4441bf680ec6dd9df2ca7a0b2cfa01b9f84f53cd06a6
- **License**: Eclipse Public License v2.0 (license header intact in the file)
- **Purpose**: The VocabDeriver parses this file via JavacTask.parse() to learn the assertion vocabulary. This is the vendor's own source — the one thing we are allowed to learn from. We do NOT hand-author a synthetic Assertions.java; that would be hand-authoring the vocab table with extra steps.
